title: Manufacturing Engineer - Akzo Nobel India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Akzo Nobel India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!
